pr.title: feat: build ALT full-stack ecommerce foundation
pr.body: ## Summary - scaffolded a complete Next.js 14 + TypeScript App Router ecommerce codebase for Avero Loose Theory - implemented ALT design system with Cormorant Garamond + DM Sans, brand color tokens, grain overlays, and framer-motion reveal patterns - built customer routes (`/`, `/products`, `/products/[slug]`, `/cart`, `/checkout`, `/journal`, `/lookbook`, `/account`) plus auth routes (`/login`, `/register`, `/forgot-password`) - added reusable UI in `components/alt/` and admin modules in `components/admin/` - set up Prisma schema/models for auth, products, categories, orders, and order items; included `prisma/seed.ts` - implemented NextAuth v5 with Prisma adapter, credentials auth, optional Google OAuth, role-aware sessions, and admin protection - shipped API routes with Zod validation for registration, forgot-password stub, products, checkout, Stripe webhook, and Cloudinary signature generation - wired Zustand stores for cart/UI state and strict typed utility/shared types ## Post-testing fixes - aligned lint/tooling dependencies and generated lockfile - fixed provider typing in auth config for strict TypeScript compatibility - updated Stripe API version typing to current SDK expectation - added local bcrypt module declaration file for strict builds - guarded product data access to fallback cleanly when `DATABASE_URL` is not configured during static builds ## Verification - `npm run prisma:generate` - `npm run lint` - `npm run build`
pr.author: sumedh-github
